name: Grilled Eggplant with Almond, Yogurt and Cori
recipeIngredient: 1 large eggplant or 2 small - sliced into 1/2-inch thick slices
1/2 cup peeled, seeded, diced tomatoes - (tomato concasse)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill.
2. In a food processor, combine almonds, coriander, garlic, honey, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Process until smooth.
3. Add yogurt to the food processor a little at a time while continuing to process until fully incorporated.
4. Stir in parsley and cilantro by hand.
5. Adjust seasonings to taste.
6. Brush eggplant with oil and season generously with salt and pepper.
7. Grill eggplant for 3 minutes on each side.
8. Serve the grilled eggplant slices with a generous drizzle of sauce, garnished with chopped tomatoes.
Yield: 2 servings (About 1 1/4 cups of sauce)
